title: Hopper Pipes
description: This pack expands the pipe part of hoppers to let them connect
body:
I've always thought its kinda strange how hoppers transfer items across each other and other storage blocks without actually being connected.

So I whipped up some models to fix this.

As a little bonus, I made hoppers powered by redstone into regular pipes without funnels, as a little visual way of seeing that they won't move items, as well as something fun to do industrial builds with.
